mapper.select: SELECT icon_id FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT login_message FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE clan_leader = #{clanLeader}
SELECT account_name FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE icon_id = #{iconId}
SELECT clan_name FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE icon_id = #{iconId}
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.clan_list SET clan_leader = #{newLeader} WHERE clan_leader = #{oldLeader}
mapper.select: SELECT icon_id FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE bellatra_points > 0 ORDER BY bellatra_points DESC, bellatra_date ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT bellatra_gold FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE clan_leader = #{clanLeader}
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.clan_list SET bellatra_gold = #{bellatraGold} WHERE clan_leader = #{clanLeader}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE bellatra_points > 0
SELECT clan_name FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE bellatra_points > 0 ORDER BY bellatra_points DESC, bellatra_date ASC LIMIT 3
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.clan_list SET bellatra_gold = bellatra_gold + #{amount} WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
mapper.select: SELECT clan_name, bellatra_points FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE bellatra_points > 0 ORDER BY bellatra_points DESC, bellatra_date ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.clan_list SET bellatra_points = #{bellatraPoints}, bellatra_date = #{bellatraDate} WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
mapper.select: SELECT bellatra_points FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
SELECT bellatra_points FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT clan_name FROM clandb.clan_list WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
